subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Hadith-i-Kuntu Kanz (Commentary on the Tradition of the Hidden Treasure)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath ascended, in the loftiness of His grandeur, above the loftiest essences of the spirit, and hath, by virtue of His eternal essence, manifested His transcendent majesty [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الل الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد تعالی بعلو کبریائیته عن علو اعلی جوهر المجردات و تعظم بذاتیة ازلیته
subcodes.subjects: @seven stages of creation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Muhammad; Islam, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @names and attributes of God, @impossibility of true worship of God
